headline: Fair Isaac (FICO)’s Strong First-Quarter Results Renew Analyst Confidence Amid Industry Softness
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the 11 best software stocks to invest in according to billionaires. As of March 9, 2026, investor sentiment surrounding Fair Isaac Corporation remains cautious, as the software applications industry faces pressure amid AI-related concerns. In line with industry-wide performance, the stock has slid roughly 15% in 2026 so […]
